# Contributing to Ambilight Desktop

Thank you for contributing.

## Getting Started

### Clone

```bash
git clone https://github.com/LMC4910/ambilightRepo.git
cd ambilightRepo
```

### Python Environment

```bash
python -m venv .venv
source .venv/bin/activate
pip install -r requirements.txt
```

### UI Setup

```bash
cd ui
pnpm install
```

## Running Tests

```bash
pytest
```

## Pull Request Guidelines

- Keep PRs focused.
- Include a clear description.
- Add tests where appropriate.
- Update documentation when necessary.
- Ensure CI passes before requesting review.

## Reporting Bugs

Use the Bug Report template.

## Feature Requests

Open a Feature Request issue or start a Discussion first for large ideas.

## Device Integrations

Include vendor, model, protocol documentation, and use case details.
